stance_by_source.summary: Consolidation buy 250–240 before Brazilian winter (June–August–September) harvest season; target 340 on seasonal tailwind and supply pressure dynamics.

plain_english: Coffee is consolidating in the 240–250 range before the June–August harvest season (Brazilian winter). Zero marks this as a tactical buy targeting 340, with the setup invalidated only if price breaks below 240. Current price sits at the entry zone. Scale in cautiously—the grade itself was marked 'partial' (7/10), so avoid all-in size. Stop if support fails; target is 100-point upside (2.3:1 reward).
